positive: A mesmerizing geometric mandala featuring bioluminescent forest elements. The central focus is an intricately stylized celestial moth with iridescent wings, surrounded by symmetrical patterns of glowing fern fronds, crystalline flora, and abstract organic curves. Composition must be perfectly balanced and radial, optimized for a circular print layout. Style: Neo-art deco and psychedelic linework combined, strong Alphonse Mucha influence, high contrast blackwork illustration accented with glowing turquoise, emerald green, and metallic gold. Lighting: Dramatic, self-illuminating glow (bioluminescence), creating deep shadows and intense highlights. Details: Vector art quality, intricate line work, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, jpeg artifacts, out of focus, monochrome, cartoonish, sloppy edges
